transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health navigation line. This is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi Ava, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Ortiz, born March 4th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see your last fill was about twenty-eight days ago at Green Leaf Pharmacy. Would you like it sent there again?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I'm submitting a refill request for lisinopril ten milligrams, thirty-day supply, to Green Leaf Pharmacy on Fifth Street.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, how long until it's ready?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Usually within a couple hours, but I'd give it until tomorrow morning just in case they need to verify with your provider.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much, Ava.
